subject: iPhone storage full — cannot update apps
description: User sees 'Not Enough Storage' when trying to update apps or take photos; phone feels slow.

ts_steps.title: iPhone Storage open
ts_steps.action: Settings → General → iPhone Storage — wait for list.

ts_steps.title: iCloud Photos optimize
ts_steps.action: Settings → Photos → Optimize Storage with enough iCloud plan.

ts_steps.title: System Data
ts_steps.action: If huge — backup and restore discussion with support.

ts_steps.title: OTA vs Finder update
ts_steps.action: Computer update may need less transient free space.

ts_steps.title: Target free space
ts_steps.action: Aim well above update size plus buffer (~10–15% total).

internal_information: OTA unpack, System Data, media hoarding. Low storage slows whole OS.
